
  // Type_stringmap
  public class Type_stringmap {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var type_map : Vx_Core.Type_map = Vx_Core.e_map
    var mapstring : [String:Vx_Core.Type_string] = [:]
  }
  // Generic_stringmap_any
  public class Generic_stringmap_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    var backref : Type_stringmap = e_stringmap
    // p_shutdown
    override public func p_shutdown() {
      v_stringmap_shutdown(self.backref)
    }
    // p_type_map
    override public func p_type_map() -> Vx_Core.Type_map {
      return self.backref.type_map
    }
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_stringmap
    }
  }
  // Generic_stringmap_map
  public class Generic_stringmap_map : Vx_Core.Generic_map {
  }
  // Generic_stringmap_type
  public class Generic_stringmap_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_stringmap = v_stringmap_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_stringmap = v_stringmap_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_stringmap = v_stringmap_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_stringmap = f_stringmap(type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_stringmap_constructor
  public static func v_stringmap_constructor(
  ) -> Type_stringmap {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_stringmap()
  }
  // v_stringmap_create
  public static func v_stringmap_create(
  ) -> Type_stringmap {
    var output : Type_stringmap = v_stringmap_constructor()
    v_stringmap_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_stringmap_register
  public static func v_stringmap_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_stringmap_startup_type()
    v_stringmap_startup_empty()
    return t_stringmap
  }
  // v_stringmap_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_stringmap_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_stringmap
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_stringmap_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = nil
    }
    value.type_map = Vx_Core.e_map
    let listany : v_listany_from_stringmap(value)
    value.mapstring = [:]
    Vx_Core.v_release_listany(mapany)
  }
  // v_stringmap_startup - mutating
  public static func v_stringmap_startup(
    _ value : Type_stringmap
  ) {
    let generic_any : Generic_stringmap_any = Generic_stringmap_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_stringmap,
      generic_any
    )
    let generic_map : Generic_stringmap_map = Generic_stringmap_map()
    value.type_map = Vx_Core.v_map_new_from_any_generic_map(
      value.type_any,
      generic_map
    )
  }
  // v_stringmap_startup_empty
  public static func v_stringmap_startup_empty() {
    v_stringmap_startup(e_stringmap)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_stringmap,
      e_stringmap.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_stringmap_startup_type
  public static func v_stringmap_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_stringmap
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/stringmap")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.c_extends_map
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_stringmap_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_stringmap
  public static func v_any_from_stringmap(
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_stringmap
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_stringmap_from_any
  public static func v_stringmap_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_stringmap {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_stringmap = Vx_Core.e_stringmap
    if let generic_any : Generic_stringmap_any = type_any.generic_any {
      output = generic_any.backref
    }
    return output
  }
  // v_stringmap_copy
  public static func v_stringmap_copy(
    _ copyval : Vx_Core.Type_stringmap,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_stringmap {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_stringmap = copyval
    Vx_Core.v_reserve_listany(
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any
      ]
    )
    let orig_anymap : Vx_Core.Type_anymap = Vx_Core.v_anymap_from_any(
      copyval.type_any
    )
    let merged_anymap : Vx_Core.Type_anymap = Vx_Core.v_anymap_from_listtype_anymap_anylist(
      [Vx_Core.t_string],
      orig_anymap,
      anylist
    )
    let msgblock : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = Vx_Core.v_msgblock_from_any(
      merged_anymap.type_any
    )
    var ischanged : Bool = false
    let orig_msgblock : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = Vx_Core.v_msgblock_from_any(
      copyval.type_any
    )
    if msgblock !== orig_msgblock {
      ischanged = true
    }
    if !ischanged {
      ischanged = Vx_Core.v_booleann_issame_from_anymap_anymap(
        orig_anymap,
        merged_anymap
      )
    }
    if ischanged {
      let type_delta : Vx_Core.Type_delta = Vx_Core.v_delta_from_any(
        merged_anymap.type_any
      )
      let listkeyn : [String] = v_listkeyn_from_map(
        merged_anymap.type_map
      )
      let mapany : [String:Vx_Core.Type_any] = v_mapany_from_anymap(
        merged_anymap
      )
      let mapstring : [String:Vx_Core.Type_string] = v_mapstring_from_mapany(
        mapany
      )
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_mapany(mapany)
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_msgblock(msgblock)
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_delta(type_delta)
      output = Type_stringmap = v_stringmap_create()
      output.mapstring = mapstring
      output.type_map.listkeyn = listkeyn
      output.type_any.type_msgblock = msgblock
      output.type_any.type_delta = type_delta
    }
    Vx_Core.v_release_except_listany(
      output.type_any,
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any,
        merged_anymap.type_any
      ]
    )
    return output
  }
  // f_stringmap
  public static func f_stringmap(
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_stringmap {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_stringmap = v_stringmap_copy(e_stringmap, anylist)
    return output
  }
  public static let t_stringmap : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_constructor()
  public static let e_stringmap : Type_stringmap = v_stringmap_constructor()
